channel.title: Emerald Pointe – Tide & Wind Conditions
channel.description: Daily marine forecast with tide & wind info for Punta Gorda

item.title: Marine Conditions for Monday, May 25
item.description: 🌊 High Tide: 12:22 PM (1.544 ft) ··· 🌊 Low Tide: 05:54 AM (0.422 ft) ··· 💨 Wind: SE 15 G 23 mph
